headline: Wedbush’s Dan Ives: AI Revolution Is Only in Third Inning. Here’s Why Nvidia and U.S. Chip Stocks Have Years of Upside Left.
summary: Wedbush’s Dan Ives went on The Pomp Podcast with Anthony Pompliano and laid out a thesis that should reframe how you think about every AI position in your portfolio. His line: “This is 3rd inning, 1 out in a 9-inning game.” If you accept that framing, the implication for chip stocks, hyperscalers, and even the ... Wedbush’s Dan Ives: AI Revolution Is Only in Third Inning. Here’s Why Nvidia and U.S. Chip Stocks Have Years of Upside Left.

headline: Regulatory Hurdles Await Massive NextEra, Dominion Energy Merger
summary: The proposed merger of NextEra Energy and Dominion Energy will require review by multiple state commissions. Read more here.
